codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review used the mission progress log plus the two truth-rails recovery commits (`e51c626c` and `a69342f6`) because the worker sessions exited before writing a final handoff artifact. The combined diff shows the required R2 checkpoint updates, targeted fixes in PurchaseResponseMapper/InvoiceService/accounting audit provenance, DTO cleanup, and substantial focused regression coverage that matches the PR #96 recovery scope without widening into unrelated behavior.

summary: Pass. The PR #96 recovery blockers were closed through the paired truth-rails commits, with governance evidence and focused runtime/test coverage aligned to the stated review comments.
